commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=56cf47e412076d500a4e5b9a0f4a41a300026e92)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a replay-safe missing-assistant retry, moves explicit Vitest logs under `.artifacts/test-logs`, rate-limits missing-auth gateway warnings while failing unauthenticated backend calls before WebSocket connect, and trims Telegram over-limit per-skill menu commands while keeping handlers.

PR surface: Source +341, Tests +322. Total +663 across 14 files.

Reproducibility: unclear. for live runtime. Source inspection and added tests cover the intended branches, but I did not reproduce the original gateway warning noise, Telegram menu behavior, or missing-assistant turn on current main in a real transport.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Protected maintainer-labeled PR needs human acceptance of auth/session compatibility risk and contributor-supplied real behavior proof rather than an automated repair.

target.title: Fix gateway warning noise and empty embedded turns
target.body:
## Summary

- Retry one replay-safe missing terminal assistant turn before surfacing incomplete-turn errors, with richer diagnostics for remaining failures.
- Keep explicit Vitest file logs out of the shared runtime log path.
- Fail fast for backend gateway calls that have no shared, paired-device, approval-runtime, or effective Tailscale auth path, and rate-limit repeated missing-auth websocket warnings.
- Drop Telegram per-skill commands from the visible menu before Telegram's command cap while keeping hidden handlers and plugin collision rules intact.

## Verification

- `pnpm test src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run.incomplete-turn.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm test src/logging/logger-settings.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-native-commands.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm test src/gateway/call.test.ts src/gateway/server/ws-connection/handshake-auth-log-limiter.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm test src/gateway/call.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm test extensions/telegram/src/bot-native-commands.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm test src/gateway/call.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-native-commands.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `git diff --check`
- `autoreview --mode local` clean
- `pnpm check:changed` via Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_01kspx1bc1fmy1p1h7zaz6p4q2` exit 0

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: gateway/watch warning noise and empty embedded-agent turn recovery.
Real environment tested: local source checkout plus Blacksmith Testbox changed checks.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: focused Vitest files above, local autoreview, git diff check, and Testbox `pnpm check:changed`.
Evidence after fix: focused tests passed; autoreview reported no accepted/actionable findings; Testbox `tbx_01kspx1bc1fmy1p1h7zaz6p4q2` completed with exit 0.
Observed result after fix: replay-safe missing assistant turns get one same-prompt retry; explicit test file logs write under `.artifacts/test-logs`; backend gateway calls without any usable credential fail before websocket unless paired, approval-runtime, or effective Tailscale auth can work; repeated missing-auth websocket logs are suppressed; Telegram drops per-skill menu entries before cap truncation while hidden handlers stay callable.
What was not tested: live Discord, Telegram, or Tailscale gateway session.
target.author: steipete

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
